title: Iran war fallout: CBSE cancels Class 12 board exams in seven Middle East countries
summary_full: CBSE has cancelled Class 12 board exams for students in Bahrain, Iran, Kuwait, Oman, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, and the UAE. This decision follows a review of the situation and inputs from local schools and authorities. Previously postponed exams are also nullified. The board will announce the method for declaring results for these students separately.
